CreateAppBlbSslListener.listenerPort: Listening port of the listener, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateAppBlbSslListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports three modes: "RoundRobin" (weighted round robin) / "LeastConnection" (least connections) / "Hash" (source IP hash)
CreateAppBlbSslListener.certIds: Certificate chain to load for the listener; only 1 certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
CreateAppBlbSslListener.encryptionType: Encryption option, default is tls_cipher_policy_default. Supported values: tls_cipher_policy_default/tls_cipher_policy_1_1/tls_cipher_policy_1_2/tls_cipher_policy_1_2_secure/userDefind. For corresponding encryption protocols and cipher suites, see: [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption)
CreateAppBlbSslListener.encryptionProtocols: When encryptionType is userDefind, a list of protocol types composed of combinations of "tlsv10", "tlsv11", and "tlsv12"
CreateAppBlbSslListener.appliedCiphers: Cipher suites, see: [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption). Multiple cipher suites are separated by a colon ":"
CreateAppBlbSslListener.dualAuth: Whether to enable mutual authentication; disabled by default
CreateAppBlbSslListener.clientCertIds: When dualAuth is true, the client certificate chain to load; only 1 certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
